name: inovar
description: - **frontend/**: React + TypeScript + Vite application. - **backend/**: Go (Golang) API server. - **scripts/**: Automation and utility scripts.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && go run main.go" "npm run dev --prefix inovar-gestao"
scripts.build: echo 'Building Backend...' && cd backend && go build -o ../inovar_api.exe main.go && echo 'Building Frontend...' && npm run build --prefix inovar-gestao
